title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.2150 - Department to use services of certain organizations, when
text:
192.2150.  Department to use services of certain organizations, when. — The department shall use the services of community based, not-for-profit organizations including senior centers for the provision of home delivered meals to qualified recipients prepared by such organizations if such service is available at not more than seventy-five percent of the cost currently incurred by the department for the provision of such service.
(L. 1992 S.B. 573 & 634, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision § 192.1030) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 660.225
